privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Ekylibre demo data from a real French farm (GAEC JOULIN, Charente-Maritime, Saint-Porchaire) loaded from the public GitHub repository https://github.com/ekylibre/first_run-demo. The farm contains anonymized real-world data including 171 bovines, 99 supplier entities, and real land parcels (ZC#01, ZC#02, ZC#06, etc.). Credentials: admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678 at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000. Task requires creating ≥3 new activity productions for 2024 campaign using ≥2 distinct crop types across distinct land parcels, verified through database queries for records created after task start.
